'''Movac Arisster''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Lorrd City]]. He had a dark-haired mustache and beard, weighed 150 kilos, was well muscled, and had considered a career in wrestling. However, he became a university [[Professor/Legends|professor]], getting a tenure with the [[University of Pangalactic Cultural Studies]].

==Biography==
Arisster studied how literary cycles from different [[Planet/Legends|planets]] became merged as they entered the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] community. He specialized in the various myths of [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], he got an incurable form of cancer and only had six months to live. It was then that he saw a vision of Aayla (in reality a projection of [[Lumiya]]) telling him to enter himself in a mythical cycle by [[Death/Legends|killing]] a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

Arisster took a number of people hostage at the [[Lorrd Academy for Aquatic Studies]], and demanded that the world's Jedi show up. When [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] refused to negotiate with him, Jacen having no other option detonated Arisster's suicide [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]], killing him and his Human shield, [[Serom Haxan]], to prevent Arisster from taunting the Jedi for their helplessness and killing other hostages with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] as the day went on.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
